Right away, the high hits fast.

First, a rush of unfocused happiness and creative euphoria fills the mind. Then, almost immediately, that mental lift softens. Calm spreads through the body. Muscles loosen. Tension melts away.

Soon after, the heavy indica side takes control. A deep body stone settles in. Limbs feel weighted. The couch becomes your best friend. Finally, sleep follows naturally.

Because of its high THC content (~65%), Tiger Blood Hash is not recommended for beginners. It’s built for seasoned users who appreciate strong, traditional OG potency.

content.rendered:
🧱🔥 MMS Hash – Classic Moroccan Import | The Working Man’s Brick 🔥🧱

Origin: Moroccan Import
THC: 48% – 65%
Type: Traditional Pressed Hash

MMS Hash stands as a true staple in the Moroccan import world.

Often referred to as the “Working Man’s Import,” MMS bridges the gap between premium connoisseur bricks and standard commercial slate. Because of its consistent quality and recognizable stamp, it has earned long-term trust among traditional hash smokers.

The exterior appears dark to sandy-brown depending on batch, protecting a lighter chocolate-toned interior. Unlike soft, gummy imports, MMS offers that classic firm texture. It snaps clean and crumbles beautifully when gently warmed — exactly how old-school smokers prefer it.

👃 Aroma & Terpene Profile

MMS delivers a clean, traditional hash nose:

  • 🌲 Earthy pine

  • 🌿 Woody spice

  • 🌬️ Subtle herbal undertones

Dominant Terpenes:

  • Myrcene

  • Pinene

  • Caryophyllene

The aroma is classic Moroccan — savory, slightly spicy, and unmistakably old-world.

⚡ Effects

If you’re looking for a functional daily smoke, MMS Hash delivers.

First, a gentle body calm settles in.
Then, shoulders loosen and stress fades.
Meanwhile, the mind stays relatively clear and manageable.

Unlike heavier AAAA imports, MMS does not overpower. Instead, it provides:

  • 😌 Physical relaxation

  • 😊 Mild mood lift

  • 🎬 Functional calm

  • 🧘 Stress reduction without full sedation

Because of its balanced profile, it works well for daytime sessions, movie nights, or winding down without full couch-lock.

🩺 Best For

  • Daily use

  • Stress relief

  • Mild anxiety

  • Budget-friendly sessions

  • Beginners entering imported hash

🔥 Texture & Usage

Texture: Firm, resinous, sandy-brown interior
Best Methods:

  • Pipe topper

  • Bottle tokes

  • Hot knives

  • Rolled “snake” inside joints

💡 Tip: Give it a quick 1–2 second light warm-up to soften oils for easy crumbling.

❓ FAQ

What does “MMS” mean?
While debated in import circles, many associate it with “Medical Standard” or “Master Selection,” indicating reliable commercial-grade quality.

Is this beginner friendly?
Yes. With moderate-to-strong THC levels and balanced effects, MMS is a solid entry point into traditional imported hash.

🟡🔥 Escobar Blonde Hash – Premium Moroccan Import | Uplifting & Potent 🔥🟡

Origin: Morocco
THC: 55% – 65%
Terpenes: Limonene • Pinene • Caryophyllene

Escobar Blonde Hash represents top-tier Moroccan craftsmanship.

Imported from traditional hash-producing regions of Morocco, this concentrate showcases expert fine-mesh sieving techniques designed to isolate mature trichomes. As a result, it delivers exceptional purity, smooth combustion, and a clean white ash.

Visually, Escobar stands out immediately. Its light sandy-gold color signals careful filtration and high-quality resin collection. The texture feels firm at room temperature; however, with slight pressure or warmth, it crumbles effortlessly into a fine, workable powder. Because of this classic pollen-press consistency, it mixes seamlessly into joints or bowls.

Once ignited, the aroma cuts through the air. Sharp citrus notes rise first. Then, sweet spice and subtle earthy undertones follow. Thanks to its terpene profile—rich in limonene, pinene, and caryophyllene—the flavor remains bright, clean, and energizing from start to finish.

⚡ Effects

Unlike darker, heavier hashes that lean deeply sedative, Escobar Blonde delivers a soaring cerebral experience.

First, a rush of mental clarity hits behind the eyes. Next, euphoria lifts the mood and sparks creativity. Meanwhile, conversation flows naturally, making this an ideal social hash. Although mild body relaxation appears later, the dominant effect remains uplifting and energetic.

Because of its 55–65% THC content, Escobar Blonde suits experienced users seeking potency without couch-lock heaviness.

✨ Best For

  • Social gatherings

  • Daytime sessions

  • Creative projects

  • Mood enhancement

  • Combating fatigue

🌬️ Aroma & Flavor Profile

  • Bright citrus

  • Sweet spice

  • Light earthy undertones

  • Clean, white-ash burn

🔥 Recommended Usage Methods

  • Smoking (joint or bowl)

  • Vaping (hash-compatible devices)

  • Bottle tokes

  • Mixing with flower

Thanks to its crumbly texture, it sprinkles easily into flower for an instant potency boost.

❓ FAQ

What makes Escobar Blonde different from darker hash?
Its lighter color indicates refined filtration and a limonene-rich terpene profile. Consequently, the effects feel more uplifting and Sativa-like rather than heavy and sedating.

Is Escobar Blonde suitable for daytime use?
Yes. Its predominantly cerebral and energizing high makes it one of the best Moroccan imports for staying functional and focused.

How does it handle?
Firm at room temperature, yet it crumbles smoothly with slight heat or pressure—perfect for rolling into joints or topping bowls.

excerpt.rendered: Escobar Blonde Hash is a premium Moroccan import featuring a sandy-gold color, crumbly pollen texture, and an uplifting cerebral high. Expect bright citrus, sweet spice, and clean-burning potency perfect for daytime use.

Bueno Hash brings authentic Old World craftsmanship straight to your stash jar.

Imported from traditional hash-making regions of Chile, this concentrate reflects classic sieve-and-press techniques perfected over generations. Unlike many modern extracts, Bueno Hash maintains a blended resinous outer layer that protects its soft, pliable core. Because of this careful curing process, the texture stays naturally workable without requiring heat.

Immediately upon opening, the aroma stands out. Deep roasted coffee notes mix with aged leather, spicy earth, and a savory richness that signals true traditional curing. Meanwhile, the terpene blend of caryophyllene, pinene, and humulene contributes both complexity and depth.

When consumed, the onset arrives quickly. First, physical tension begins to dissolve. Then, mental stress fades into the background. Shortly after, a weighted full-body stone settles in, anchoring you firmly to the couch. Unlike racy hybrid highs, Bueno Hash delivers a slow, heavy, and immersive relaxation.

Because of its powerful sedative nature and high THC content (56–70%), this hash is strongly recommended for evening sessions, lazy weekends, or as a nightcap before bed.

Because of its soft and malleable texture, it rolls easily into thin “snakes” for slow, even burns. Additionally, it bubbles vigorously when heated, producing thick, milky smoke.

❓ FAQ

How can I tell this is a real import?
The aroma and texture are key indicators. Authentic Bueno Hash carries a savory, coffee-like scent with spicy undertones. It remains naturally soft without needing to be warmed.

Is this hash suitable for daytime use?
Not typically. The effects are physically heavy and sedating. It works best when your schedule is clear for the evening.

🌍🔥 Moroccan Hash – Classic Rif Style 🔥🌍

Moroccan Hash is a time-honoured cannabis concentrate with deep cultural roots in the Rif Mountains of Morocco. To begin with, it’s traditionally crafted from resin-heavy cannabis plants, including classic Rif and Ketama genetics, prized for their rich trichome production.

In appearance, this hash is instantly recognizable. Typically, it shows a darker outer layer with a lighter interior, along with a firm yet workable texture that breaks down smoothly when warmed.

When it comes to flavour, Moroccan Hash delivers a classic earthy and spicy profile. Right away, warm soil and herbal notes come forward. Shortly after, subtle floral tones appear, finishing with a light black pepper kick on the exhale. The smoke stays smooth, aromatic, and never overpowering.

As for the effects, Moroccan Hash provides a quick-onset, buzzy euphoria that lifts the mood and clears the mind. At the same time, a gentle body relaxation settles in, keeping things calm without heavy sedation. Because of this balance, it works well for social settings, creative activities, or light daytime use.

Thanks to its moderate THC levels and traditional preparation, Moroccan Hash remains a go-to choice for those seeking authentic flavour, reliable effects, and classic hash character.

Purple Urkle is a legendary California classic with roots going back to the late 1980s 🌿. Often linked to Mendocino Purps and closely related to Granddaddy Purple, this indica-leaning hybrid has earned its reputation as a true nighttime staple.

Right away, Purple Urkle greets you with rich grape and sweet berry flavours, followed by a slightly skunky, fruity aroma that fills the room 🍇✨. The buds stand out with deep purple hues, bright orange hairs, and a dense, bushy indica structure.

As the effects settle in, a strong physical body buzz takes over. Muscles begin to loosen, stress fades, and the mind drifts into a calm, happy state 😌. Shortly after, the indica side shines through, bringing heavy relaxation and sleepy vibes, making this strain an excellent choice before bed.

With 18–21% THC, Purple Urkle delivers reliable potency without overwhelming the senses. Because of its soothing nature, many users turn to this strain for insomnia, chronic pain, anxiety, and nausea, especially during the evening or nighttime hours.

If you’re looking for a grape-flavoured, old-school indica that truly helps you shut things down for the night, Purple Urkle is a must-try 💜.

Chara Temple Coins Hash represents one of the purest and most traditional forms of hashish still available today 🌄. Crafted using fresh cannabis plants, this hash follows time-honoured Himalayan techniques passed down through generations.

To begin with, artisans gently hand-roll fresh resin into compact coin-shaped pieces. Because the resin is never dried before processing, the final result stays soft, sticky, and extremely rich in cannabinoids. As a result, Chara Temple Coins retain an unmatched depth of flavour and potency.

Once heated, the experience unfolds smoothly. First, bold earthy notes appear. Shortly after, hints of spice and pine come through, followed by a subtle citrus finish. Meanwhile, the effects settle into the body, delivering deep physical relaxation while keeping the mind clear and calm. With THC levels ranging from 55% to 80%, even small amounts provide powerful, long-lasting results 🔥.

For this reason, Chara Temple Coins are best enjoyed by experienced users who appreciate authentic hash with strong effects and cultural heritage.

Nepalese Temple Ball Hash is one of the oldest and most respected forms of hashish in the world 🌿. Crafted for generations in the Himalayan regions of Nepal, this iconic concentrate stands apart for its traditional production, striking appearance, and extreme potency.

First, fresh cannabis resin is carefully collected by hand. Then, skilled artisans slowly roll the resin into dense, polished balls, allowing heat, pressure, and time to work naturally. Because of this process, each temple ball develops a shiny exterior, soft interior, and incredibly smooth smoke.

Once consumed, the experience unfolds steadily. At first, rich earthy flavours coat the palate. Shortly after, subtle sweetness appears. Soon after that, a deep body calm settles in, easing tension while quieting the mind. With THC levels ranging from 55% to 80%, even a small amount delivers powerful, long-lasting effects 🔥.

How to Use

  • Battery Setup: Attach to any standard 510-thread battery (not included)
  • Temperature: Use low to medium voltage settings (2.4-3.2V) to preserve terpene flavour
  • Inhalation: Take slow, steady draws for 2-3 seconds; avoid rapid or forceful pulling
  • Priming: Take 1-2 primer puffs without inhaling when first using to activate the coil

Onset & Duration

  • Onset: 1-5 minutes
  • Peak Effects: 15-30 minutes
  • Duration: 1-3 hours depending on dosage and tolerance

Best Use Cases

Ideal for on-the-go convenience and discreet consumption. Perfect for users seeking full-spectrum effects with authentic strain flavour profiles. The live resin extraction preserves natural terpenes for superior taste and entourage effects compared to standard distillate cartridges.

⚠️ Storage Tip: Store upright in a cool, dark place. Avoid extreme temperatures which can affect oil viscosity and flavour quality.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

What makes live resin cartridges different from regular vape cartridges?

A: Live resin is extracted from fresh-frozen cannabis plants, preserving the full terpene profile and natural flavours. Unlike distillate cartridges that use reintroduced terpenes, Pineapple Express Meds Live Resin contains the plant’s original terpenes for authentic taste and enhanced entourage effects. This results in a more flavourful, aromatic, and potentially more effective experience.

Is the Pineapple Express Meds cartridge compatible with my battery?

A: Yes! This cartridge features a universal 510-thread connection, compatible with virtually all standard vape pen batteries. For best results, use a variable voltage battery set between 2.4-3.2V to preserve the delicate terpenes and prevent burnt taste.

Does this cartridge contain any additives or cutting agents?

A: Absolutely not. Pineapple Express Meds Live Resin Cartridges contain 100% pure live resin with no VG, PG, MCT oil, vitamin E acetate, synthetic terpenes, or any other additives. What you get is pure, full-spectrum cannabis oil in its most natural form.

How should I store my live resin cartridge?

A: Store your cartridge upright in a cool, dark place away from direct sunlight and heat sources. Avoid leaving it in hot cars or cold environments. Keep the mouthpiece covered when not in use to prevent clogging. Proper storage maintains oil viscosity, flavour quality, and potency for the life of the cartridge.

How many uses can I get from a 1ml cartridge?

A: A 1ml cartridge typically provides 200-400 inhalations depending on draw length and frequency. For moderate users taking 2-4 draws per session, this translates to approximately 50-100 sessions. Actual usage varies based on individual consumption habits and tolerance levels.

Does Mohawk Medibles ship vape cartridges across Canada?

A: Yes! We offer fast, discreet Canada-wide shipping on all vape products including the Pineapple Express Meds Live Resin Cartridge. Orders are processed the same day when placed before 2 PM EST and shipped in plain, unmarked packaging to ensure privacy and product protection during transit.

Why does my cartridge sometimes clog or leak?

A: Live resin has a thicker consistency than distillate. Clogs can occur in cold temperatures—gently warm the cartridge in your hands before use. To prevent leaking, always store upright and avoid over-tightening onto your battery. If clogging occurs, try taking a few primer puffs or briefly warming the cartridge. Never store horizontally for extended periods.

Strain Description:
Starburst OG is a balanced hybrid (50% indica/50% sativa) created from Fire OG and Pre-98 Bubba Kush. It has a sweet, sour lemon candy flavor with diesel and pine aromas. The high starts with euphoria and clarity, followed by deep physical relaxation that leaves you couch-locked. With 26-33% THC, it’s ideal for experienced users dealing with stress, anxiety, depression, pain, and insomnia.

🌿 A Brief History of Hashish and Its Methods of Consumption

Hashish, often simply called hash, is one of the oldest known cannabis concentrates, with a rich cultural and medicinal history dating back thousands of years.

🕰️ Origins and Historical Use

The word hashish comes from the Arabic “ḥašīš”, meaning “grass” or “herb”. It is believed to have originated in the Middle East and Central Asia, particularly in areas like Persia (modern-day Iran), India, and Afghanistan, where cannabis was both spiritually and medicinally significant.

By the 10th century, hashish was widely consumed throughout the Islamic world, especially as smoking tobacco was not yet prevalent. Hashish was popular among Sufi mystics, who used it to achieve altered states of consciousness. By the 18th and 19th centuries, it spread into Europe, where it fascinated writers and artists like Baudelaire and Dumas, especially through the experiments of the Paris-based “Club des Hashischins”.

🔥 Modern Ways to Consume Hashish

Hashish has evolved in potency and preparation over time, but its consumption methods have remained relatively consistent. Common ways include:

1. Smoking

  • Traditional Pipe or Chillum: Popular in India and the Middle East.
  • Rolled with Flower (Spliff or Joint): Crumbled into cannabis or tobacco.
  • Hot Knives or Bowl: Pressed between heated metal and inhaled.

2. Vaporizing

  • Used in modern dry herb vaporizers that can reach the right temperature to activate cannabinoids without burning.
  • Cleaner and smoother than smoking.

3. Dabbing

  • For modern solvent-extracted or rosin-style hash, it can be dabbed using a dab rig—delivering fast, potent effects.

4. Edibles

  • Hash can be decarboxylated and infused into butter or oil, then used in food.
  • Effects are slower but significantly longer-lasting and stronger.

5. Topical or Medicinal Use

  • In traditional medicine, hashish was sometimes used in salves or tinctures for pain and inflammation.

🌍 Cultural Legacy

Hashish continues to be a staple in traditional cannabis culture, especially in countries like Morocco, Nepal, Lebanon, and India. With the global cannabis movement evolving, hash is making a modern comeback in dispensaries as a natural, solventless concentrate.

In essence, hashish is not just a product—it’s a historical artifact of how humans have interacted with cannabis for centuries. Whether consumed for spiritual insight, relaxation, or wellness, its legacy remains deeply rooted in global cannabis culture.

Purchase our Starburst Hash 24k Full Melt 75-80% THC today and enjoy high tense flavors and an enjoyable high.

🧬 Strain Profile

Genetics & Lineage

PB Breath (Peanut Butter Breath) is a distinguished hybrid strain created by crossing Do-Si-Dos with Mendo Breath F2. This 24k Full Melt Hash preserves the complete genetic expression of this sought-after cultivar, capturing the full spectrum of cannabinoids and terpenes through meticulous ice water extraction methods.

Dominant Terpenes

  • Caryophyllene: Provides spicy, peppery notes and potential anti-inflammatory properties
  • Limonene: Contributes citrus undertones and uplifting characteristics
  • Linalool: Delivers floral, lavender-like aromatics with calming effects

Cannabinoid Profile

This full melt hash boasts an exceptional 75-80% THC concentration, representing one of the most potent forms of cannabis available. The solventless extraction process preserves the complete cannabinoid spectrum, including minor cannabinoids and terpenes that contribute to the entourage effect.

Appearance & Structure

True to its “full melt” designation, this 24k hash exhibits a sticky, resinous consistency that completely vaporizes when heated, leaving minimal residue. The golden-amber colouration indicates high-quality trichome heads with excellent preservation of the plant’s natural oils and compounds.

Similar Strains

If you enjoy PB Breath hash, consider exploring other premium concentrates derived from Dosidos, Mendo Breath, or Wedding Cake genetics for comparable nutty, earthy flavour profiles with powerful relaxing effects.

–

💡 Usage Guide

Recommended Dosage

  • Beginners: Start with a tiny piece (0.02-0.05g) in a joint or pipe. Wait 10-15 minutes between hits
  • Experienced Users: Begin with a grain-of-rice sized amount (approximately 0.025-0.05g)
  • High Tolerance: 0.05-0.1g per session, adjusting based on desired effects

Consumption Methods

  • Dabbing: Use a dab rig or e-nail at 315-370°C for optimal flavour preservation and full melt vaporization
  • Vaporizing: Load into a concentrate-compatible vaporizer for portable, discreet consumption
  • Topping Flower: Crumble small amounts onto packed bowls or inside joints for enhanced potency
  • Hot Knifing: Traditional method using heated knives for direct vaporization
  • Hash Edibles (Advanced): To make edibles, decarboxylate hash at 110-120°C (230-250°F) for 30-40 minutes to activate THC. Mix into butter or oil-based recipes. Effects take 30-120 minutes and last 6-12 hours. Hash edibles are significantly more potent than flower edibles—start with 1/4 of your normal flower edible dose.

Onset & Duration

  • Onset: Immediate to 3 minutes when dabbed or vaporized
  • Peak Effects: 15-30 minutes after consumption
  • Duration: 2-4 hours depending on dosage and tolerance

Best Use Cases

This premium full melt hash is ideal for evening relaxation, deep meditation, or managing discomfort. The high THC content and full spectrum profile make it perfect for experienced consumers seeking fast-acting, potent effects. Best enjoyed during downtime when you can fully appreciate the complex flavour profile and powerful body relaxation.

⚠️ Important Safety Information: This concentrate contains 75-80% THC and is extremely potent. Not suitable for beginners or those new to concentrates. Start with minimal amounts and wait 10-15 minutes before consuming more. Do not drive or operate machinery after use. Store securely away from children and pets.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

What is full melt hash and how is it different from regular hash?

A: Full melt hash is the highest quality solventless concentrate, made using ice water extraction to separate trichome heads from plant material. Unlike pressed hash, full melt completely vaporizes when heated without leaving residue, indicating superior purity. The “24k” designation refers to premium quality comparable to 24-karat gold standards.

How potent is PB Breath 24k Full Melt Hash?

A: With 75-80% THC, this full melt hash is extremely potent and recommended exclusively for experienced cannabis consumers. It’s approximately 3-4 times stronger than average cannabis flower and delivers immediate, powerful effects. Always start with the smallest possible amount if you’re new to concentrates.

How should I store PB Breath Full Melt Hash?

A: Store in an airtight silicone or glass container in a cool, dark place, ideally in the refrigerator. Keep away from heat, light, and moisture to preserve potency and consistency. Properly stored full melt hash maintains quality for 6-12 months. Always allow refrigerated hash to reach room temperature before opening to prevent condensation.

Can beginners use this full melt hash?

A: No, we strongly recommend this product for experienced consumers only. The 75-80% THC concentration is too potent for those new to cannabis or concentrates. Beginners should start with lower potency flower (15-20% THC) or microdose edibles before progressing to concentrates.

What’s the best temperature for dabbing PB Breath hash?

A: For optimal flavour and effects, dab between 315-370°C (600-700°F). Lower temperatures (315-345°C) preserve terpenes and provide smoother, more flavourful hits. Higher temperatures (345-370°C) produce larger vapour clouds and more immediate effects. Avoid temperatures above 400°C as they can degrade cannabinoids and produce harsh vapour.

Does Mohawk Medibles ship PB Breath Full Melt Hash across Canada?

A: Yes! We offer fast, discreet Canada-wide shipping with same-day processing on orders placed before 2 PM EST. Your full melt hash arrives in plain, unmarked packaging with proper insulation to maintain product integrity during transit. All concentrates are packaged securely to prevent damage or leakage.

Is this hash solventless and how does that benefit me?

A: Yes, full melt hash is completely solventless, made using only ice water, agitation, and filtration. This means no butane, propane, or chemical solvents touch your concentrate. The result is a purer, cleaner product that preserves the plant’s natural terpene profile and provides a more authentic representation of the PB Breath strain’s characteristics.

🌿 A Brief History of Hashish and Its Methods of Consumption

Hashish, often simply called hash, is one of the oldest known cannabis concentrates, with a rich cultural and medicinal history dating back thousands of years.

🕰️ Origins and Historical Use

The word hashish comes from the Arabic “ḥašīš”, meaning “grass” or “herb”. It is believed to have originated in the Middle East and Central Asia, particularly in areas like Persia (modern-day Iran), India, and Afghanistan, where cannabis was both spiritually and medicinally significant.

By the 10th century, hashish was widely consumed throughout the Islamic world, especially as smoking tobacco was not yet prevalent. Hashish was popular among Sufi mystics, who used it to achieve altered states of consciousness. By the 18th and 19th centuries, it spread into Europe, where it fascinated writers and artists like Baudelaire and Dumas, especially through the experiments of the Paris-based “Club des Hashischins”.

🔥 Modern Ways to Consume Hashish

Hashish has evolved in potency and preparation over time, but its consumption methods have remained relatively consistent. Common ways include:

1. Smoking

  • Traditional Pipe or Chillum: Popular in India and the Middle East.
  • Rolled with Flower (Spliff or Joint): Crumbled into cannabis or tobacco.
  • Hot Knives or Bowl: Pressed between heated metal and inhaled.

2. Vaporizing

  • Used in modern dry herb vaporizers that can reach the right temperature to activate cannabinoids without burning.
  • Cleaner and smoother than smoking.

3. Dabbing

  • For modern solvent-extracted or rosin-style hash, it can be dabbed using a dab rig—delivering fast, potent effects.

4. Edibles

  • Hash can be decarboxylated and infused into butter or oil, then used in food.
  • Effects are slower but significantly longer-lasting and stronger.

5. Topical or Medicinal Use

  • In traditional medicine, hashish was sometimes used in salves or tinctures for pain and inflammation.

🌍 Cultural Legacy

Hashish continues to be a staple in traditional cannabis culture, especially in countries like Morocco, Nepal, Lebanon, and India. With the global cannabis movement evolving, hash is making a modern comeback in dispensaries as a natural, solventless concentrate.

In essence, hashish is not just a product—it’s a historical artifact of how humans have interacted with cannabis for centuries. Whether consumed for spiritual insight, relaxation, or wellness, its legacy remains deeply rooted in global cannabis culture.

A: Store your RSO syringe or jar in a cool, dark place away from direct sunlight and heat. Keep upright to prevent leaking. Properly stored RSO maintains potency for 1-2 years. title.rendered: Pineapple Express Meds (PEM) Full Spectrum Shatter

content.rendered:
Pineapple Express Meds Shatter is an amber or gold color and is transparent to some degree. The reason shatter concentrate is semi-clear has to do with the molecules in the extracted cannabis oil. In shatter, these molecules are all stacked nice and neat in straight rows, one on top of the other. This molecular alignment allows light to pass through the marijuana extract and gives the shatter its glass-like properties.

Heat, moisture, and high terpene content can affect the texture and extraction, which may turn extracted oils into a runnier substance that resembles sap but retaining its translucent appearance.

Concentrates other than shatter and sap are whipped, stirred, or shaken at various times during the process, agitating the individual molecules in the mixture and causing their cloudy appearance. Shatter is not agitated which accounts for its translucency.

Origins & Production

Moroccan Love Hash originates from the Rif Mountains of Morocco, home to over 220,000 acres of cannabis cultivation and the world’s most renowned hashish production. This traditional hash is produced using time-honored dry-sift methods passed down through generations of Moroccan farmers. The cannabis plants are carefully dried, then gently sieved through fine screens to separate the trichome-rich kief, which is subsequently pressed into dense, hard blocks using traditional hand-pressing techniques.

Characteristics & Quality Markers

This indica-dominant hash presents as a hard, non-pliable concentrate with a distinctively smooth smoke profile that’s gentle on the throat. The organic production methods ensure a pure, chemical-free product that showcases the natural properties of Moroccan cannabis genetics. The dark brown to black exterior and lighter interior coloring are hallmarks of authentic Moroccan hash. Its firm texture and clean burn indicate proper curing and high trichome concentration.

Potency & Effects Profile

As a heavy indica-dominant hash, Moroccan Love delivers potent, full-body effects characteristic of traditional Moroccan concentrates. The elevated cannabinoid content provides significantly stronger effects than cannabis flower, making it ideal for experienced consumers seeking deep relaxation and sedative properties. The smooth, earthy flavor profile reflects its organic cultivation and traditional processing methods.
